Translation.Text:
Do only use original secondary parts of the CEKA & PRECI-LINE product range produced by Alphadent nv. To find a CEKA and PRECI-LINE distributor in your area please check our distributors page: http://www.ceka-preciline.com/distributors.php
Please refer to the instructions for use: http://www.ceka-preciline.com/download.php The manufacturer disclaims any liability for damage caused by failure to follow the instruction for use.
Alphadent nv does not assume any liability for the quality of the milled bars or any parts which are not of CEKA & PRECI-LINE origins.
